page.title: Sjögren's Syndrome — RepurpOS | OpenSourceMedicine
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for Sjögren's Syndrome: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for Sjögren's Syndrome: 10 alterations and 0 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

gmi_articles.title: An adverse immune reaction to wheat proteins is more commonly apparent (anti-tTG) in Sjögren's syndrome.
Bovine Colostrum has beneficial effects in Sjogren's syndrome and oral lichen planus.
Cardamonin is a potential candidate for controlling inflammation during primary Sjögren's syndrome.
Celiac disease prevalance is significantly higher in those diagnosed with Sjogren's syndrome.
Data support pro- and anti-inflammatory roles within EFA metabolism
DHEA restores concentrations of sex steroids in primary Sjogren's syndrome.
Effect of laser acupuncture on salivary flow rate in patients with Sjögren's syndrome.
Efficacy and safety of total glucosides of paeony in treating primary Sjögren's syndrome.
Gut dysbiosis is prevailing in Sjögren's syndrome and is related to dry eye severity.
Peony extract is equivalent to that of hydroxychloroquine sulfate but with higher safety in the treatment of Sjogren syndrome.
Pycnogenol supplementation in patients with Sjogren syndromein a remission phase may be effective to control inflammation and reduce symptoms.
Supplementation with Pycnogenol® may offer advantages and management possibilities for patients with vasculitis diseases allowing to avoid more potentially dangerous drug treatments.
The effects of noninvasive vagus nerve stimulation on fatigue and immune responses in patients with primary Sjögren's syndrome.
The study results suggest that higher adherence to a Mediterranean dietary pattern was consistently associated with lower symptom burden.

There is a close association between Sjögren's syndrome and celiac disease. Even among nonceliac patients with primary Sjögren's syndrome, an ongoing inflammation is often present in the small bowel mucosa.
Total glucosides of paeony appears to improve the glandular secreting function and decrease the level of inflammatory cytokines.
Paeoniflorin may provide a new therapeutic approach to regulate P2X7R-mediated pathologic responses of primary Sjögren's syndrome.
A case report of Non-Hodgkin's lymphoma of the thyroid after many years of immunizations.
A case report of Sjogren's syndrome after hepatitis B vaccination.
Molecular hydrogen therapy in Sjögren's syndrome with pulmonary arterial hypertension and right-sided heart failure.
Reversal of premature ovarian failure in a patient with Sjögren syndrome using an elimination diet protocol has been reported.
Acteoside promotes B cell-derived IL-10 production and ameliorates autoimmunity.
Alum induces a Sjögren’s syndrome-like disorder in mice.
Blueberry stem extract prevents lacrimal hyposecretion.
Exploring the immunomodulatory mechanism of total glucosides of paeony on Sjögren's syndrome dry eye disease based on the "gut-eye axis" pathway.
Green tea polyphenols reduce autoimmune symptoms in a mouse model for human Sjogren's syndrome.
Induction of p21 by EGCG could provide clinically useful normalization of salivary glands by promoting differentiation and reducing PCNA levels.
Lactobacillus acidophilus and propionate attenuate Sjögren's syndrome.
Lycium barbarum polysaccharide ameliorates Sjögren's syndrome.
Oral consumption of the green tea polyphenol EGCG improves disease paramaters in a mouse model of human Sjogren's syndrome.
Paeoniflorin alleviated experimental Sjögren's syndrome.
Paeoniflorin ameliorates symptoms of experimental Sjogren's syndrome associated with down-regulating Cyr61 expression.
The effect of total glucoside of paeony on gut microbiota in NOD mice with Sjögren's syndrome.
These studies show that ultrasoluble curcumin and turmeric could prove useful as a therapeutic intervention in systemic lupus erythematosus and Sjogren's syndrome.
Total glucosides of paeony alleviates experimental Sjögren's syndrome through inhibiting NLRP3 inflammasome activation of submandibular gland cells.
Total glucosides of peony ameliorates Sjögren's syndrome by affecting the Th1/Th2 cytokine balance.
A comprehensive review of the influence of Epigallocatechin gallate on Sjögren's syndrome associated molecular regulators of exocytosis.
BPA accelerated the progression and further deterioration of primary Sjögren's syndrome.
Calycosin synergizes with methotrexate in the treatment of Sjögren's disease by targeting BATF in T follicular helper cells.
Combined use of total glucosides of paeony and hydroxychloroquine in primary Sjögren's syndrome.

disclaimer: Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
